SEARCH
Package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.dto

Class ManagerIssueReportResponse.ReportImageResponse

java.lang.Object
edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.dto.ManagerIssueReportResponse.ReportImageResponse
Enclosing class:
ManagerIssueReportResponse
public static class ManagerIssueReportResponse.ReportImageResponse extends Object
Nested DTO exposing a subset of ReportImage fields for manager views.

      Returns the album order index used for sorting images within a report.

    • fromEntity

      public static ManagerIssueReportResponse.ReportImageResponse fromEntity(UUID reportExternalId, ReportImage reportImage)
      Creates a report image DTO from an entity.
      Parameters:
      reportExternalId - external identifier of the parent report (used to build an API locator).
      reportImage - source entity.
      Returns:
      populated DTO, or null if reportImage is null.
